data.body:
=== PROGRESS (loop iteration 2026-06-15T03:32Z) ===
CLOSED this iteration (both committed + PUSHED to origin/main):
- (b) 4168-c28e-6505-406d Mutation testing — DONE. mutmut 3.6.0 wired ([tool.mutmut] config, docs/mutation-testing.md baseline). next_batch.py 62.7%->99.2% mapped score (survivors 236->6); reducer/_processors.py 97.3%->99.4%. Rewrote 1 assertion-light test; added test_next_batch_behavior.py + test_reducer_record_fields.py. Commit 369d82ea.
- roam-crone-disco 60a0-3aee-98e8-4094 (sub-piece of c) — DONE. sign_result + verify_signature_result schemas registered; --output json validation tests; _OUTPUT_SCHEMA_GAPS exclusion removed. Commit 72455f08.

REMAINING task (c) e143-31fd-bf2f-458e (claim it, then tackle in pieces):
  1. MCP outputSchema audit: confirm EVERY advertised MCP command that returns structured data advertises an outputSchema (now incl. sign/verify if exposed); add coverage test.
  2. Jira reconciler bidirectional field round-trips — LIVE DIG authorized (bridge-probe / reconcile dry-run are NON-destructive). Verify field mappings round-trip both directions.
  3. Internal contracts across CLI+lib+MCP: exit-10 optimistic-concurrency, lock discipline, deterministic replay.
  4. Behavior x interface coverage matrix DOC + coverage.py measurement with a recorded target.
THEN: (d) cf14-d845-075a-4f74 test reorg along seams (note: tests/interfaces has 42 files, over the 24 cap — reorg target); (e) 6623-726e-980e-4ace opus SDET review loop; then close epic.

ENV: dev venv /tmp/rebar-dev, fixed --basetemp=/tmp/rebar-pytest. Broad suite 1751 passed / integration 8. ruff clean. AUTO-PUSH on ticket close is now standing policy (user-directed); each loop fire FIRST checks main CI (gh run list) and fixes red before feature work.
